training_status: Started kettlebell lifting in March, 3-4x/week; walking 15,000 steps/day; previously athletic but no resistance training

compounds.frequency: 5x per week plus extra for workouts

benefits.description: Lost 20 pounds, sitting at about 12-13% body fat

side_effects.description: IPA+CJC impacting sleep negatively; trying to find ideal dosing time
Reta causing stomach pains; had to increase fibre and magnesium to maintain regularity
BPC-157 appears to impact 5-HT2A receptors; felt intense blunting of psychedelics and possible anhedonia when combined

protocol_notes: 45-year-old male, 5'11", starting weight ~180 lbs. Started lifting kettlebells in March. Very disciplined diet: strict macros, no snacking, no alcohol, no cheats. Low-dose Reta at 2mg/week split into 3 doses (~0.666mg each). IPA+CJC each at 150mcg 5x/week plus extra dose for workouts. Also using BPC-157 and TB (Thymosin Beta?) stacked, injected in back. Sources peptides from a Canadian supplier with 3rd-party testing. Recommends medical testing to monitor long-term health. Notes IPA+CJC dose not confirmed per compound — stated as '150 each per day'.
